name: ASUS ROG Strix Helios II Hatsune Miku Edition E-ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - GPU Slot Clamp - Rear Detachable PSU Bracket - 2x USB 20Gbps Type-C - ARGB-lighting Control Button - Fan-speed PWM Control Button (ROG STRIX HELIOS II GX601S HATSUNE MIKU)
